channel.title: Ghost Orgy Updates
channel.description: Release notes, press notes, and site updates from Ghost Orgy.

item.title: Ghost Orgy press kit
item.description: Press assets, bios, artwork, links, and licensing contact for Ghost Orgy.

item.title: Listen to Ghost Orgy
item.description: Start with Salt and The Sky That Fears Us, then follow Ghost Orgy on the main listening platforms.

item.title: Salt is available
item.description: Salt is the debut album by Ghost Orgy, a Phoenix-based experimental post-hardcore project by Jack Dyer.
